title: Exegesis Highlight Menu

menu.excerpt: Paul, a servant of Christ Jesus, called to be an apostle and set apart for the gospel of God.
menu.noteDraft: Paul opens with his credentials as a servant and apostle.

note: WEB-ONLY comparison: the iOS HighlightActionMenuContent is a private SwiftUI view inside EditExegesisActivityPage with no ViewRegistry capture case. The web twin was built 1:1 from the Swift source spec (parity-edit-exegesis-activity memory).
